expectations.text: At least 5 pivot directions using named Lean Startup types
expectations.evidence: 5+ pivot types named and described (customer segment, business architecture, zoom-in, etc.)

expectations.text: Each pivot grounded in specific pilot evidence
expectations.evidence: Pivots reference price sensitivity and ERP integration data

expectations.text: ERP integration gap addressed by at least one pivot
Price sensitivity signal addressed by at least one pivot
Recommendation identifies which pivot to explore first
What is still true from pilot explicitly stated
expectations.evidence: Preserved learnings identified: technical matching works, adoption partially validated
